title: build_request takes extra_caps: &[&str] to force explicit capability declarations
description: build_request always includes 'urn:ietf:params:jmap:core' and appends each element of extra_caps. Call sites pass &["urn:ietf:params:jmap:chat"] for chat methods and &[] for methods that only need core. RFC 8620 §3.3 requires the 'using' array to list only capabilities actually used; sending extra capability URIs the server does not know may cause an 'unknownCapability' error. A contributor might suggest hard-coding 'jmap:chat' inside build_request ('every call uses chat anyway'). That assumption would break if a non-chat JMAP method (quotas, blob) is added. The slice parameter keeps the invariant enforced at the call site.
close_reason: Decision record: current implementation is correct; no code change needed
